_meta.description: Named caps and thresholds for ce-user-test deterministic scripts and prose.
_meta.schema: Each entry has a value, unit, and one-line meaning. JSON has no comments, so this _meta object is the header.

probe_run_history_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent per-area probe run results and drop older results.

cross_area_probe_run_history_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent cross-area probe run results and drop older results.

probe_synthesis_per_run_cap.meaning: Limit synthesized cross-area Explore Next Run entries from shared weakness classes.

tactical_notes_per_area_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent tactical notes in an area's Notes column.

novelty_fingerprints_per_area_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent novelty fingerprints for each area.

score_history_per_area_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent score-history entries for each area and query.

test_history_cap.meaning: Keep the most recent rows in tests/user-flows/test-history.md.

ux_opportunities_lifecycle.meaning: Keep recent open UX opportunities and age out implemented or wont_fix entries.

good_patterns_unconfirmed_runs.meaning: Remove a good pattern after this many runs without reconfirmation.

bug_archive_age_months.meaning: Archive fixed or stale bug records after this age.

pass_threshold.meaning: Default minimum UX score for an area to count as passing.

quality_threshold.meaning: Default minimum quality score for scored_output areas to count as passing.

delta_warning_threshold.meaning: Warn when the current completed run falls below the previous comparable run by more than this delta.

pattern_surfacing.meaning: Surface recurring best-area and worst-area patterns after enough appearances in the recent run window.

issue_dedup_overlap_threshold.meaning: Treat a GitHub issue candidate as duplicate when title token overlap meets or exceeds this ratio.

journal_staleness.meaning: Warn before resuming old journals and default very old journals to rollback.

journal_heartbeat_window.meaning: Treat a recent journal heartbeat as evidence that another commit-engine process may still be active.
